title: C59 · Create-Format as Gateway to Mage-Tier

story.text:
# 💡 C59 · Create-Format as Gateway to Mage-Tier
**concept** · shared · knowledge

A persona-bearing agentic-substrate (SOUL.md / Honcho user-modelling / learning-loop) carries Mage-grade properties at adoption time. Provisional (70%). Hermes is the first observable case. Whether the Mage-class collapse formally lands is held open via C57.

## Edges in

- [[Tome V Act 16: The Threshold]] *introduces* →
- [[Tome VI Act 1: The Reader's First Admission]] *references* →
